text: As soon as I heard “play pass” I checked out.
text_zh: 一听到“play pass”我就不看了。

text: What happened to buying stuff and not needing to pay for a subscription ontop of purchasing in order to use what you just paid fortune for
text_zh: 怎么回事，买东西还要额外付订阅费才能用你花了大价钱买的东西

text: Play pass? Sounds like another subscription 😭
text_zh: Play pass？听起来又是一个订阅服务 😭

text: Since it has camera… is it safe to use? How’s their privacy policy?
text_zh: 既然它有摄像头…用起来安全吗？他们的隐私政策怎么样？

text: Remember when Eyetoy came out on PS2? you purchased it and it came with a game (play or play2) that had 100 of the same type of mini game, no subscription, no internet, no downloads, just plug and fun. Miss those days.
text_zh: 还记得 PS2 上的 Eyetoy 吗？你买了它，它就带一个游戏（play or play2），里面有几百个同类型的小游戏，不用订阅，不用网络，不用下载，插上就能玩。怀念那段时光。

text: So it’s a Wii with subscription…
‘Play pass’ it’s like a tax you pay to use the device you bought! Awesome 🫩
text_zh: “Play Pass” 就像是你给买的设备交的税！太绝了🫩

text: Reminds me of Eyetoy from ps2😍 that was 🔥as a kid
text_zh: 让我想起了 PS2 的 Eyetoy😍 小时候玩得超嗨

text: If it didn’t need a subscription it would be perfect, but I don’t pay subscriptions like that
text_zh: 如果不需要订阅就好了，但我不付这种订阅费
那不是 Xbox Kinect 吗

text: omg this is the eye toy

It's like an up to date version of what I had on my PS2 years ago, Oh then there's the Xbox Kinect that was fun, Nothing new but it looks good and hopefully overtime finds a true value as I think it's a bit expensive for what it is
text_zh: 这就像是我多年前 PS2 上的东西的升级版，哦还有 Xbox Kinect 也很有趣，没什么新东西，但看起来不错，希望以后能找到真正的价值，因为我觉得它卖得有点贵，对它本身来说

text: So an Eyetoy with a subscription? Love the idea of an updated version, but I’m so done with subscriptions.
text_zh: 所以是带订阅的 Eyetoy？喜欢这种更新版本的想法，但我真的受够订阅制了。
我们是从那个视频来的

text: 199usd shipped to Canada.. so whatever that is with tarrifs and shit.
text_zh: 199美元运到加拿大……所以加上关税之类的，大概就那个价了。

text: Whats it called? Can we get in the uk? Please and thanks!
text_zh: 它叫什么名字？在英国能买到吗？拜托了，谢谢！

text: so cool but looked it up and woah the price 💀 ljke $400 for a no name gaming thing that's a bit harsh
text_zh: 太酷了，但查了一下价格，哇塞 💀 400美元买个杂牌游戏机，有点狠啊

text: How did this outsell the new xbox on black Friday?! 😭
text_zh: 这玩意儿怎么能在黑色星期五销量超过新款 Xbox？！😭

text: spur at suncoast casino has this
text_zh: Suncoast 赌场里的 spur 有这个

text: I’m pretty sure leap frog has something similar to this for cheaper
text_zh: 我敢肯定 Leap Frog 有个差不多的，还便宜点
基本上就是没有控制器的 Wii

text: How does it detect the kids body? Do they have wristbands
text_zh: 它怎么检测到孩子身体的？需要戴腕带吗？
这玩意儿销量是不是已经超过Xbox了？？

text: Only available in the US for now
I’m interested in this who can give an update on how they like it along with the subscription pros and cons
text_zh: 我对这个感兴趣，谁能更新一下用着怎么样，还有订阅的优缺点

text: But how much is the play pass?
This is literally just a Wii why not just buy them a Wii😂
text_zh: 这简直就是 Wii，为什么不直接买个 Wii😂

text: My kids love the Nex playground
Honestly, it seems very good for Kids and there is no equivalent solutions available (as Kinect is dead) How does it work ? Is it running Android ?
text_zh: 老实说，对孩子来说似乎非常好，而且没有类似的解决方案（因为Kinect已经死了）它是怎么工作的？它运行Android吗？

text: And it’s also over 300$ at Walmart.
text_zh: 沃尔玛上也要 300 多美元。

text: Wasn't this just the kinect thing that allowed you to move around? I remember the pet one where it would appear it was in the room with you and the surfing/snowboarding that required that balance board too
text_zh: 这不就是那个能让你活动的Kinect吗？我记得那个宠物游戏，好像它就在你房间里，还有那个需要平衡板的冲浪/滑雪游戏

text: 👀may we know the name of this

text_zh: 老实说，这看起来太绝了

text: You should link it in the caption. I couldn't find it in your storefront, so I just searched it on my own.
text_zh: 你应该把链接放在说明里。我没在你的店铺里找到，就自己搜了一下。

text: Reminds of my Kinect. It was so much fun with the kids.
text_zh: 让我想起了我的 Kinect。和孩子们玩得超开心。

text: Just saying Hi! I've never met or seen another Chelsy ❤️
text_zh: 就打个招呼！我从来没见过另一个Chelsy ❤️
有什么能跟 aliexpress 差不多的吗？

text: you can buy Xbox 360 with Kinect, less than 100usd
text_zh: 你可以买个 Xbox 360 带 Kinect，不到 100 美元

text: who in the right mind would buy this its 250 dollars just buy a ps2 and a eyetoy and loads of games for the eyetoy that barely makes 250 dollars
text_zh: 正常人谁会买这个啊，250美元，直接买个PS2加个EyeToy还有一大堆EyeToy游戏都差不多250美元

text: So a Nintendo Wii mix with Kinect
text_zh: 所以是结合了Kinect的任天堂Wii

text: What’s the jumping game called? It looks so fun!
text_zh: 那个跳跃的游戏叫什么名字？看起来太好玩了！

text: i got this for christmas for my sister and forgot about it already but its fun
text_zh: 我圣诞节给我妹买的，结果已经忘了，不过挺好玩的

text: Imagine people looking at the window and you see this
text_zh: 想象一下别人看着窗户，看到这个

text: It’s like an Eye toy from PlayStation. Looks sick.
text_zh: 这就像PlayStation的Eye toy。看起来超酷。

text: Reminds me of the ps2 eye camera for interactive games. I loved it!
text_zh: 让我想起了PS2的EyeToy摄像头，玩互动游戏超棒。我超爱它！

text: Do they have a lot of one-player games or is it all for siblings?
text_zh: 它有很多单人游戏还是都是给兄弟姐妹玩的？

text: yeah when they get bored the tv would be damaged
text_zh: 对，他们无聊了电视就坏了

text: im gonna get one. but can you tell me where your couch is from?!
text_zh: 我准备买一个。但你能告诉我你的沙发是哪儿买的吗？！

text: honestly not too mad about the subscription considering games are now $40-$60 each, so $90 for a year of all games doesnt seem that crazy tbh just as long as they dont get greedy and start raising it
text_zh: 说实话，考虑到游戏现在要40-60美元一个，90美元一年的所有游戏听起来也不是那么离谱，只要他们不贪心涨价就行

text: 300 for a camera with only 35 games. be foreal
text_zh: 300 块钱就买个摄像头，才 35 个游戏。讲点道理吧。

text: I would not like a subscription it's already 250 bucks
text_zh: 我不太想要订阅，它已经250块了

text: Outsold the Xbox series x btw 💔✌
text_zh: 比 Xbox Series X 卖得还好呢 💔✌

text: Not better than a wii at all. A modded wii is cheaper and better by far & no subscription
text_zh: 一点都不比 Wii 好。破解过的 Wii 便宜得多，而且更好，还没订阅费

text: Christmas gift for Fabian and Fay
text_zh: 给 Fabian 和 Fay 的圣诞礼物

text: No such thing as too hot to go outside
text_zh: 没有太热不能出去的时候

text: does it have an option to buy games or is it a pass system only? also how well does it age? any slightly more 'grown up' games for the tweens?
text_zh: 有没有选项可以买游戏，还是只能买通行证？而且它能用多久？有没有适合大一点的孩子的游戏？
所以就相当于一个 Xbox Kinect ？？

text: How much is the play pass?
how does it work ? I don't understand. Are the kids holding anything?
text_zh: 这是怎么玩的？我不懂。孩子们手里拿着东西吗？

text: which game is your kids favorite
text_zh: 你家孩子最喜欢哪个游戏？

text: My kid just watches. Doesn’t move
text_zh: 我孩子就看看，一动不动。

text: @💜Amanda💜 she neeeeeds this like our old kinect! she can set it up on my tv in the livingroom
text_zh: @💜Amanda💜 她太需要这个了，就像我们以前的Kinect一样！我可以在客厅的电视上帮她设置好。

text: hi I've been trying to find this but I cant
text_zh: 嗨，我一直在找这个，但找不到

text: It's really easy for kids to navigate thru the menu too, I just really hate the subscription aspect...
text_zh: 孩子们也很容易操作菜单，我就是特别讨厌订阅模式...

text: I got one and it's totally worth it!
@lexxarmani Kyan will love this in about a year
text_zh: @lexxarmani Kyan大概一年后会喜欢这个

text: @ErebusCollects i want to buy the kids this for christmas
text_zh: @ErebusCollects 我想圣诞节给孩子们买这个
@Sαɳԃყ ﾒº 是给 Cami 的吗？圣诞节🤔
